//SchemaVersion: Bump when fields change shape; loaders use this to migrate.
//LibraryRoot: Absolute path to the music library root. Album folders land at LibraryRoot/<Album Artist>/<Album> (Year)/.
//DriveLetter: Optical drive letter, e.g. 'D:'. Filled by setup/Register-Drive.ps1.
//DriveOffset: AccurateRip read offset in samples for this drive. Filled by setup/Register-Drive.ps1.
//MusicBrainzUserAgent: Required by MusicBrainz ToS. Format: 'AppName/Version ( contact-email )'. Set by New-RipperConfig.ps1.
//OneDrivePath: Optional: absolute path inside OneDrive to mirror the library to. null = disabled.
//SynologyUnc: Optional: UNC path of NAS share (e.g. \\nas\music). null = disabled.
//SynologySyncReviewQueue: If true, NAS sync also copies _ReviewQueue/. Default false to keep scratch work off the family library.
//HasSynologyCredential: Flag only — true means a DPAPI-protected PSCredential is on disk in credentials.clixml.
//MetadataProviders: Ordered list of metadata sources tried in priority order. Phase 5.2: MusicBrainz (curated, canonical) then CuetoolsDb (community-submitted) then GnuDb (legacy freedb/CDDB catalog, huge coverage of older and community-submitted discs). When two or more return matches, an extra synthesized 'Merged (...)' candidate is prepended (earlier providers win on conflict, later ones fill nulls). Available: 'MusicBrainz', 'CuetoolsDb', 'GnuDb'.
//CoverArtProviders: Ordered list of cover-art sources. First non-empty bytes win. CoverArtArchive needs a release MBID (so really only fires for MB-derived candidates); iTunesSearch + Deezer fall back to artist+album text search. All three are free / no auth.
